mapper.sql: id,url,thumbnailUrl,name, introduction,category,tags, picSize,picWidth,picHeight, picScale,picFormat,userId, createTime,editTime,updateTime, isDelete,reviewStatus,reviewMessage, reviewerId,reviewTime,spaceId, commentCount,likeCount,shareCount, viewCount,isDraft,IsFeature,IsDownload,recommendScore,hotScore, allowCollect,allowLike,allowComment,allowShare
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND spaceId IS NULL AND reviewStatus = 1 AND createTime >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) ORDER BY recommendScore DESC, createTime DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT
FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND spaceId IS NULL AND reviewStatus = 1 AND createTime >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) ORDER BY recommendScore DESC, createTime DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT
FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND spaceId IS NULL AND reviewStatus = 1 AND createTime >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) ORDER BY recommendScore DESC, createTime DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT
FROM picture
WHERE userId = #{userId} AND isDraft = 1 AND isDelete = 0 AND spaceId IS NULL
ORDER BY createTime DESC

SELECT
FROM picture
WHERE userId = #{userId} AND isDraft = 1 AND isDelete = 0 AND spaceId IS NULL
ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, COALESCE(viewCount, 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(likeCount, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(commentCount, 0) AS commentCount, COALESCE(shareCount, 0) AS shareCount, createTime FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND reviewStatus = 1 AND isDraft = 0 ORDER BY id LIMIT #{param2} OFFSET #{param1}

SELECT id, COALESCE(viewCount, 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(likeCount, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(commentCount, 0) AS commentCount, COALESCE(shareCount, 0) AS shareCount, createTime FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND reviewStatus = 1 AND isDraft = 0 AND spaceId IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT #{param2} OFFSET #{param1}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND reviewStatus = 1 AND isDraft = 0 AND spaceId IS NULL
SELECT MAX(id) FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND reviewStatus = 1 AND isDraft = 0

SELECT id, COALESCE(viewCount, 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(likeCount, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(commentCount, 0) AS commentCount, COALESCE(shareCount, 0) AS shareCount, createTime FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND reviewStatus = 1 AND isDraft = 0 AND id BETWEEN #{minId} AND #{maxId} ORDER BY id LIMIT #{param4} OFFSET #{param3}

SELECT id, COALESCE(viewCount, 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(likeCount, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(commentCount, 0) AS commentCount, COALESCE(shareCount, 0) AS shareCount, createTime FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND reviewStatus = 1 AND isDraft = 0 AND spaceId IS NULL AND id BETWEEN #{minId} AND #{maxId} ORDER BY id LIMIT #{param4} OFFSET #{param3}

SELECT
FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 1 AND updateTime >= #{updateTime}

SELECT
FROM picture WHERE isDelete = 0 AND isDraft = 0 AND reviewStatus = 1 AND spaceId IS NULL
AND (createTime < #{cursorCreateTime} OR (createTime = #{cursorCreateTime} AND id < #{cursorId}))
ORDER BY createTime DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize}
